name: Employee-canteen_wallet
label: Canteen Wallet
description: Link to the employee's canteen wallet for meal payments

name: Employee-enable_canteen_wallet
label: Enable Canteen Wallet
description: Enable canteen wallet access for this employee

name: Employee-wallet_credit_limit
label: Wallet Credit Limit
description: Credit limit for the employee's canteen wallet

name: Employee-dietary_preferences
label: Dietary Preferences
options:
Vegetarian
Non-Vegetarian
Vegan
Jain
No Preference
description: Employee's dietary preferences for canteen service

name: User-canteen_role
label: Canteen Role
options:
Canteen Admin
Canteen Manager
Canteen Cashier
Canteen Staff
Canteen User
description: Assigned canteen role for this user

name: POS Invoice-canteen_employee
label: Canteen Employee
description: Employee paying via wallet — select an employee to see their wallet balance

name: POS Invoice-canteen_wallet_balance
label: Wallet Balance
description: Employee's current wallet balance (shown for reference)

name: POS Opening Entry-canteen_shift_name
label: Shift Name
description: Label this shift (Morning / Afternoon / Evening / General)
